V-M-017.checks: Verify that routing is simplified to Full Tunnel via DE. Treat split-tunneling, ipset, mangle, DNS observer, and policy resolver references only as regression guards for removed behavior. Verify all client traffic routes through DE server in live gates.
V-M-017.commands: python -m py_compile backend/app/routing/manager.py backend/app/routing/router.py && bash -n deploy/deploy-on-server.sh
V-M-017.module-checks: python -m py_compile backend/app/routing/manager.py backend/app/routing/router.py bash -n deploy/deploy-on-server.sh static review: app/routing imports only manager/router and deploy does not recreate ipset/mangle setup
V-M-017.classification: References to ipset, split-tunneling, mangle, resolver, and policy modules are not active requirements. They are allowed here only to assert that removed artifacts do not return to runtime or deploy surfaces.

scenarios.scenario: Client connects, all traffic (including RU domains) goes via DE server.
Removed split-tunnel artifacts are absent from active routing runtime and live RU host checks.
YouTube and Google are accessible via VPN (previously failing).
Existing deploy scripts remain operator-approved and do not reintroduce removed resolver or route-policy runtime dependencies.
Imports of deleted modules (policy, domain_rules) found in source.

V-M-017.required-log-markers: [Routing][tunnel][FORWARD_ACTIVE] — Simple forwarding check [Routing][cleanup][SPLIT_TUNNELING_REMOVED] — Confirmation of removal
V-M-017.redaction: Never log internal IPs or routing table details.

verification-level.level-1: Unit tests verify no imports of deleted modules.
verification-level.level-3: Client connects, accesses YouTube/Google via DE.

execution-evidence.local-checks: python -m py_compile backend/app/routing/manager.py backend/app/routing/router.py passed; bash -n deploy/deploy-on-server.sh passed via the consolidated deploy syntax check.
execution-evidence.live-gates: Not run in local execute: client traffic via DE, YouTube/Google access, and host ipset/mangle absence on RU VPS.
